features: ✅ REMOVABLE FABRIC BRUSH FOR EXTRA CARE-This handheld steamer for clothes includes a removable fabric brush that ensures smoother, wrinkle-free clothes. Hand held steamer gently lifts and separates fabric fibers, making it easier to steam away stubborn wrinkles. Perfect for delicate fabrics, Hand steamer also removes dust and lint, providing extra garment care.

✅ GENEROUS 400ML WATER TANK-The 400ml water tank in the hand steamers for clothing offers ample steam for longer sessions, so you can de-wrinkle multiple garments without constantly refilling. The garment steamer for clothes' larger capacity provides up to continuous steam for a more efficient steaming experience.

✅ VERSATILE STEAMING – NO IRONING BOARD NEEDED-The hand held steamers for clothes work both vertically and horizontally, meaning you can steam clothes hanging or lying flat without the need for an ironing board. Whether you're touching up your wardrobe or steaming curtains, travel clothes steamer makes ironing effortless. Steamer iron for clothes' compact design allows for easy maneuverability and safe use on all fabrics.

✅ SAFE AND EASY TO USE-One-touch operation allows for hassle-free steaming with instant results from iron steamer. The fabric protection ensures your clothes are safe from burns and damage during steaming done with travel steamer iron. This steamer’s design is lightweight and ergonomically crafted, providing comfortable control for easy use.

✅ PORTABLE AND COMPACT FOR TRAVEL-Ideal for travel, this portable clothes steamer' compact size and sleek handle make it easy to store and carry in a suitcase or bag. Steamer clothes' lightweight yet powerful, offering professional-level steaming wherever you go. Whether you're on a business trip or vacation, this clothing steamer ensures your clothes look fresh at all times.
description: Product Description POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT The powerful 1500W motor heats up fast and delivers continuous steam for efficient and effortless ironing. 400ML WATER TANK CAPACITY The 400ml detachable water tank offers generous capacity for continuous use and effortless refilling every time. VERTICAL & HORIZONTAL STEAMING Enjoy effortless wrinkle removal with vertical and horizontal steaming for flexible, convenient garment care. COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN Compact and lightweight design makes it easy to carry and store, ideal for travel and small living spaces. 360° SWIVEL CORD PROTECTION Enjoy effortless movement in any direction with a tangle-free cord design that ensures durability and long-lasting use. STEAM BRUSH Includes a powerful steam brush that efficiently removes wrinkles, keeping your fabrics smooth and fresh. STAINLESS STEEL PANEL This garment steamer features a durable stainless steel panel that ensures smooth, efficient, and wrinkle-free steaming. CONTINUOUS STEAM Tackle multiple garments with ease – this steamer provides powerful, continuous steam for effortless wrinkle removal.
